name: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: Thin and light laptop powered by the M2 chip, featuring a 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display and up to 18 hours of battery life.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5
description: Industry-leading noise-canceling wireless headphones with Auto NC Optimizer and up to 30 hours of battery life.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with ultra-fast MagSpeed scrolling, quiet clicks, and an 8000 DPI track-on-glass sensor.

name: Dell UltraSharp 27 4K USB-C Hub Monitor
description: 27-inch 4K monitor featuring IPS Black technology for brilliant color and contrast, plus extensive connectivity options.

name: Keychron Q1 Pro Mechanical Keyboard
description: 75% layout QMK/VIA wireless custom mechanical keyboard with a full aluminum CNC machined body and hot-swappable switches.

name: Samsung T7 Shield Portable SSD 2TB
description: Rugged, fast, and compact portable solid-state drive with read/write speeds of up to 1,050/1,000 MB/s and IP65 water resistance.

name: Anker 737 Power Bank
description: 24,000mAh 3-port portable charger with a 140W output, capable of fast-charging laptops, tablets, and phones.

name: Herman Miller Aeron Chair
description: Ergonomic office chair featuring Pellicle suspension material to dissipate body heat and fully adjustable lumbar support.

name: Nintendo Switch OLED Model
description: Versatile gaming console with a vibrant 7-inch OLED screen, a wide adjustable stand, and a dock with a wired LAN port.

name: Yeti Rambler 20 oz Tumbler
description: Stainless steel, vacuum insulated tumbler with a MagSlider lid, designed to keep drinks hot or cold for hours.
